articles.title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash - TechCrunch
articles.description: Claude Guillemot, who founded Ubisoft with his four brothers, has died at the age of 69.
articles.content:
Claude Guillemot, co-founder of French video game company Ubisoft, died Friday at the age of 69.

articles.content:
